In some cases, you may find courses which have more than one catalogue number assigned to a single meet (a single lecture, tutorial, lab etc.). Multiple catalogue numbers indicate that the course is cross-listed. For more information about the cross-listing, please see the course description in the Courses Web site.

 Enrolment by permission only. Interested fourth year Honours students who meet the prerequisites of the course should complete a ÃÂ course permission form. The Course Director(s) will select from those who apply. Decisions are made before the start of term. Note: Students must complete community partner risk management requirements by the start of the term to take the course (details to be provided).ÃÂ

Interested fourth year BHS Specialized Honours students who meet the prerequisites of the course should complete a ÃÂ course permission form. The Course Director(s) will select from those who apply. Decisions are made before the start of term. Note: Students must complete community partner risk management requirements by the start of the term to take the course (details to be provided).

In some cases, you may find courses which have more than one catalogue number assigned to a single meet (a single lecture, tutorial, lab etc.). Multiple catalogue numbers indicate that the course is cross-listed. For more information about the cross-listing, please see the course description in the Courses Web site.
